def filter_species_by_length(species_list, min_length):
    """
    Filters a list of frog species names, returning only those with more than
    the specified number of characters.
    """
    return [name for name in species_list if len(name) > min_length]

# Example usage
species_list = ["Blommersia bara", "Mantidactylus grandidieri", "Boophis madagascariensis", "Aglyptodactylus madagascariensis"]
min_length = 15
print(filter_species_by_length(species_list, min_length))
# Expected output: ["Mantidactylus grandidieri", "Boophis madagascariensis", "Aglyptodactylus madagascariensis"]
